question_text: I see ____ orange on the table.
explanation: Orange so'zi unli tovush bilan boshlangani uchun biz 'an' artiklini ishlatamiz.

question_text: Look at ____ moon! It is very bright tonight.
explanation: Quyosh va oy kabi atrofimizda yagona bo'lgan narsalar uchun 'the' artikli qo'llaniladi.

question_text: My friend lives in ____ Samarkand.
explanation: Kartochkaga ko'ra, shaharlar oldidan hech qanday artikl ishlatilmaydi.

question_text: I bought ____ pen yesterday. The pen is blue.
explanation: Sanaladigan, birlikdagi va birinchi marta tilga olinayotgan narsa uchun 'a' ishlatamiz.

question_text: She likes ____ dogs.
explanation: Ot ko'plikda (dogs) bo'lgani uchun uning oldiga 'a' yoki 'an' qo'ymaymiz, bu holatda umuman artikl kerak emas.

question_text: I have ____ umbrella.
explanation: Umbrella so'zi unli tovush bilan boshlanadi, shuning uchun 'an' to'g'ri tanlovdir.

question_text: John is eating an apple. ____ apple is sweet.
explanation: Olmalar ikkinchi marta eslatilayotgani uchun, biz aniq narsani bildiruvchi 'the' artiklini ishlatamiz.

question_text: ____ water is cold.
explanation: Suv kabi umumiy ma'nodagi tushunchalar oldidan odatda hech qanday artikl qo'yilmaydi.

question_text: I have three ____.
explanation: Ko'plikdagi otlar oldidan 'a' yoki 'an' ishlatib bo'lmaydi, shuning uchun 'cats' so'zi artiklsiz ishlatiladi.

question_text: My name is ____ David.
explanation: Kartochkaga muvofiq, odamlarning ismlari oldidan hech qanday artikl qo'yilmaydi.

question_text: Tanlang: _____ am a student.
explanation: Gapda ish-harakatni bajaruvchi shaxs kerak, 'am' yordamchi fe'li bilan faqat 'I' kishilik olmoshi ishlatiladi.

question_text: Ushbu gapdagi bo‘sh joyni to‘ldiring: Look at the bird! _____ is flying.
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko‘ra, jonzot yoki narsalar uchun 'it' kishilik olmoshi ishlatiladi.

question_text: Qaysi biri egalik olmoshi hisoblanadi?
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko‘ra, 'my' egalik olmoshi bo‘lib, undan keyin ot kelishi shart.

question_text: Gapni to‘ldiring: This is _____ car. It is blue.
explanation: Buyum kimga tegishli ekanini bildirish uchun egalik olmoshi 'my' kerak, undan keyin 'car' oti kelgan.

question_text: Gapdagi to‘g‘ri variantni toping: I want to talk to _____, please.
explanation: Kartochka 4 ga ko‘ra, fe’ldan (talk) keyin obyekt olmoshi ishlatilishi kerak, 'him' esa obyekt olmoshidir.

question_text: Quyidagi gapni to‘ldiring: Do you see the children? Please help _____.
explanation: Gapda 'children' so‘ziga ta’sir o‘tkazilayotgani uchun obyekt olmoshi 'them' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Qaysi gapda egalik olmoshi xato ishlatilgan?
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko‘ra, egalik olmoshidan (her) keyin ot kelishi shart. 'She is her' gapida 'her' dan keyin ot yo‘q.

question_text: Gapni to‘ldiring: Sarah is my sister. I love _____ very much.
explanation: Bu yerda Sarah ish-harakatni bajarmayapti, aksincha unga ta’sir o‘tyapti, shuning uchun obyekt olmoshi 'her' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Qaysi gapda kishilik olmoshi va obyekt olmoshi to‘g‘ri ketma-ketlikda ishlatilgan?
explanation: Gapda ish-harakatni bajaruvchi 'He' (kishilik olmoshi), harakat qaratilgan shaxs esa 'her' (obyekt olmoshi) bo‘lishi kerak.

question_text: Quyidagi gapda nima uchun 'their' ishlatilgan? 'I like their cat.'
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko‘ra, 'their' egalik olmoshi bo‘lib, u mushuk (cat) kimga tegishli ekanini ko‘rsatadi.

question_text: Choose the correct adjective to describe the noun: 'She is a ____ teacher.'
explanation: Sifat otni tasvirlaydi va odatda otning oldida keladi. 'Happy' sifati 'teacher' (ot) so'zini tasvirlab kelmoqda.

question_text: Select the correct adverb to complete the sentence: 'He speaks English ____.'
explanation: Kartochkaga ko'ra, 'good' sifatining ravish holati 'well' bo'ladi. Bu yerda fe'l (speaks) ta'riflangani uchun ravish kerak.

question_text: Which word is an adjective in the phrase 'a quiet room'?
explanation: 'Quiet' so'zi 'room' (ot) ni tasvirlab, uning qanday ekanligini bildirmoqda, demak u sifatdir.

question_text: Identify the adverb in the sentence: 'They walk slowly.'
explanation: Ravish ish-harakat qanday bajarilganini ko'rsatadi va ko'pincha '-ly' qo'shimchasi bilan tugaydi. 'Slowly' bu yerda yurish harakatini tasvirlamoqda.

question_text: Choose the correct form: 'The ____ bird sings ____.'
explanation: Birinchi bo'sh joyda otni ta'riflovchi sifat (sweet), ikkinchisida esa ish-harakatni ta'riflovchi ravish (sweetly) ishlatilishi kerak.

question_text: Select the correct option: 'It was a ____ day, so he worked ____.'
explanation: Ba'zi so'zlar shaklini o'zgartirmaydi. 'Hard' ham sifat, ham ravish vazifasida o'zgarmasdan qo'llanadi.

question_text: Complete the sentence: 'The cat is ____. It moves ____.'
explanation: Sifat 'cat' (ot) ni tasvirlaydi (quiet), ravish esa 'moves' (fe'l) harakatini tasvirlaydi (quietly).

question_text: Which sentence is grammatically correct?
explanation: Sifat otning oldida kelishi kerak ('quick runner'). 'Quick' sifat, 'runner' esa ot.

question_text: Identify the correct usage: 'She cooks ____ meals. She cooks ____.'
explanation: Sifat 'meals' (ot) ni tasvirlaydi (good), fe'l (cooks) uchun esa 'good' ning ravish shakli 'well' dan foydalanamiz.

question_text: Choose the correct sentence based on the rule that adverbs describe how an action is performed:
explanation: Ravish ish-harakat qanday bajarilganini ko'rsatadi. 'Dances' (fe'l) uchun 'beautifully' ravishi to'g'ri tanlovdir.

question_text: Choose the correct preposition: 'The keys are ___ the table.'
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, biror narsaning ustki qismini bildirish uchun 'on' predlogi ishlatiladi.

question_text: Choose the correct preposition: 'We have an English lesson ___ 9 AM.'
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, aniq soatlar uchun 'at' predlogi ishlatiladi.

question_text: Choose the correct preposition: 'He is waiting for the taxi ___ the bus stop.'
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, aniq bir nuqtani bildirish uchun 'at' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Complete the sentence: 'My birthday is ___ June.'
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, oylar kabi vaqt oralig'i uchun 'in' predlogi qo'llanadi.

question_text: Which sentence is correct regarding movement?
options: She is going into the park.
She is going to the park.
She is going at the park.
She is going on the park.
correct_answer: She is going to the park.
explanation: Kartochka 4 ga ko'ra, biror joyga qarab harakatlanayotganda 'to' predlogi ishlatiladi.

question_text: Choose the correct preposition: 'The teacher is ___ the classroom.'
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, ichkaridagi yopiq makonlar uchun 'in' predlogi ishlatiladi.

question_text: Complete the sentence: 'We usually go on vacation ___ summer.'
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, fasllar kabi kattaroq vaqt oralig'i uchun 'in' predlogi ishlatiladi.

question_text: Choose the correct option: 'I will meet my friend ___ Friday.'
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, kunlar uchun 'on' predlogi ishlatiladi.

question_text: Which of these sentences correctly uses the preposition 'into'?
explanation: Kartochka 4 ga ko'ra, ochiq joydan yopiq joyning ichkarisiga kirib borayotganda 'into' ishlatish ancha aniqroqdir.

question_text: Select the correct combination: 'See you ___ Monday ___ 10 AM.'
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, kunlar uchun 'on', soatlar uchun esa 'at' predlogi ishlatiladi.

question_text: Qaysi so'z 'narsalarning sonini' bildiradi va 'Nechta?' savoliga javob bo'ladi?
explanation: Kartochka 1 ga ko'ra, miqdor sonlar (cardinal numbers) narsalarning sonini bildiradi va 'nechta' savoliga javob bo'lib, oddiy sanash uchun ishlatiladi (one, two, three).

question_text: Tartib sonlar predmetning qaysi xususiyatini ifodalaydi?
explanation: Kartochka 2 da aytilishicha, tartib sonlar (ordinal numbers) predmetning o'rnini yoki tartibini bildiradi va 'nechanchi?' savoliga javob bo'ladi.

question_text: Quyidagi sonlardan qaysi biri istisno hisoblanadi va '-th' qo'shimchasi qo'shilmaydi?
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga muvofiq, birinchi (first), ikkinchi (second) va uchinchi (third) sonlari tartib son yasashda istisno hisoblanadi.

question_text: 20 dan 90 gacha bo'lgan sonlarni yasashda qaysi qo'shimchadan foydalanamiz?
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga binoan, 20 dan 90 gacha bo'lgan o'nliklarni yasashda '-ty' qo'shimchasidan foydalaniladi.

question_text: 13 soni ingliz tilida qanday tugashi kerak?
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 13-19 gacha bo'lgan sonlar '-teen' bilan tugaydi.

question_text: 305 sonini ingliz tilida to'g'ri ifodalash qaysi?
explanation: Kartochka 4 ga ko'ra, 101 dan 999 gacha bo'lgan sonlarni aytganda yuzlikdan keyin 'and' so'zi ishlatiladi.

question_text: Agar biz 500 sonini ingliz tilida aytmoqchi bo'lsak, qaysi qoida to'g'ri?
explanation: Kartochka 4 ga muvofiq, yuzlik (hundred) va minglik (thousand) sanalganda ulardan so'ng 's' qo'shimchasi qo'shilmaydi.

question_text: Quyidagilardan qaysi biri tartib son hisoblanadi?
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, tartib sonlar odatda sonning oxiriga '-th' qo'shimchasini qo'shish orqali yasaladi.

question_text: Tartib sonlar yasash qoidasiga ko'ra, '5th' qanday o'qiladi?
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, tartib sonlar predmetning o'rnini bildiradi va ularni yasash uchun odatda '-th' qo'shimchasi qo'shiladi (5 -> fifth).

question_text: Qaysi qatorda miqdor va tartib sonlar to'g'ri ajratilgan?
explanation: Kartochka 1 ga ko'ra, 'one' miqdor son (nechta?), Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra esa 'first' tartib son (nechanchi?) hisoblanadi.

question_text: How _______ students are there in the classroom?
explanation: Students so'zi sanaladigan va ko'plikda kelgan ot, shuning uchun biz 'many' so'zini ishlatamiz.

question_text: I don't have _______ money in my pocket.
explanation: Money (pul) sanalmaydigan ot hisoblanadi, shuning uchun inkor gapda 'much' ishlatiladi.

question_text: There is _______ water in the glass. It is almost empty.
explanation: Water sanalmaydi. Stakan deyarli bo'sh bo'lgani uchun yetarli emasligini bildiruvchi 'little' ishlatamiz.

question_text: I have _______ apples, so we can make a salad together.
explanation: Apples sanaladigan ot va 'salad qilish' uchun yetarli ekanini anglatgani uchun 'a few' mos keladi.

question_text: He has very _______ friends, he feels lonely.
explanation: Friends sanaladigan ot. U o'zini yolg'iz his qilayotgani uchun do'stlari yetarli emas, ya'ni 'few' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Could you give me _______ sugar for my tea, please?
explanation: Sugar (shakar) sanalmaydigan ot. Choyga shakar qo'shish uchun ozgina kerakligi sababli 'a little' ishlatiladi.

question_text: How _______ information did you find about the project?
explanation: Information so'zi sanalmaydigan ot hisoblanadi, shuning uchun savol gapda 'much' ishlatiladi.

question_text: I have _______ time left, so I cannot finish the task now.
explanation: Time sanalmaydigan ot. Vazifani tugata olmasligimiz vaqt juda oz va yetarli emasligini bildiradi, shuning uchun 'little' ishlatamiz.

question_text: There are _______ cars on the street today, so there is no traffic.
explanation: Cars sanaladigan ot. Yo'lda tirbandlik yo'qligi mashinalar soni juda kam va yetarli emasligini anglatadi, shuning uchun 'few' to'g'ri.

question_text: We have _______ cookies in the jar. Would you like one?
explanation: Cookies sanaladigan ot. 'Would you like one?' taklifi bizda bir nechta (yetarli) pechenye borligini ko'rsatadi, shuning uchun 'a few' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Quyidagi gaplardan qaysi birida fe'l 'bog'lovchi' (linking verb) hisoblanadi?
explanation: Bog'lovchi fe'llar eganing holati yoki sifatini bildiradi. 'Smells' so'zi sho'rva va uning sifati (yaxshi/mazali) o'rtasida ko'prik vazifasini o'tayapti.

question_text: Quyidagi gaplardan qaysi birida fe'l 'yordamchi' (auxiliary) vazifasida kelgan?
explanation: Yordamchi fe'l o'zidan keyin harakatni (-ing shakli) bildiruvchi asosiy fe'lga ko'maklashadi. Bu gapda 'are' yordamchi fe'l, 'watching' esa asosiy fe'ldir.

question_text: Bog'lovchi fe'lning asosiy vazifasi nima?
options: Subyekt va uning holati yoki sifati o'rtasida ko'prik bo'lish.
correct_answer: Subyekt va uning holati yoki sifati o'rtasida ko'prik bo'lish.
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, bog'lovchi fe'llar harakatni emas, kimdir yoki nimadir qandayligini bildiradi.

question_text: 'She is tired' gapidagi 'is' fe'li qanday vazifani bajargan?
explanation: Fe'ldan keyin sifat ('tired') kelgani uchun bu bog'lovchi fe'ldir. U subyekt va uning holati o'rtasida ko'prik bo'lmoqda.

question_text: Quyidagi gaplarning qaysi birida 'is' yordamchi fe'l sifatida ishlatilgan?
explanation: Yordamchi fe'ldan keyin harakatni bildiruvchi -ing shakli keladi. 'Singing' harakatni bildirgani uchun 'is' yordamchi fe'l sanaladi.

question_text: Qaysi gapda fe'l subyektning holatini tasvirlab kelgan?
explanation: 'Becomes' fe'li eganing holatini (charchaganligini) bildiradi va sifat bilan bog'lanmoqda, shuning uchun u bog'lovchi fe'ldir.

question_text: Bog'lovchi fe'lni yordamchi fe'ldan farqlashning eng oson usuli nima?
options: Fe'ldan keyin sifat yoki harakat kelganiga qarab aniqlash.
correct_answer: Fe'ldan keyin sifat yoki harakat kelganiga qarab aniqlash.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, fe'ldan keyin sifat kelsa - bog'lovchi, -ing yoki -ed shaklidagi harakat kelsa - yordamchi fe'ldir.

question_text: Quyidagi gaplardan qaysi birida 'look' fe'li bog'lovchi vazifasini bajaradi?
explanation: Ushbu gapda 'look' so'zidan keyin sifat ('happy') kelgan. Sifat kelishi fe'lning bog'lovchi ekanligini anglatadi.

question_text: 'They are cleaning the house' gapida 'are' fe'lining vazifasini aniqlang.
options: Yordamchi fe'l, chunki undan keyin -ing shaklidagi harakat kelgan.
Asosiy fe'l, chunki u ish-harakatni bajaradi.
Bog'lovchi fe'l, chunki u sifatdan oldin kelgan.
correct_answer: Yordamchi fe'l, chunki undan keyin -ing shaklidagi harakat kelgan.
explanation: Kartochka 1 va 3 ga ko'ra, agar fe'ldan keyin -ing shakli kelsa, u yordamchi fe'l hisoblanadi.

question_text: Quyidagi gaplardan qaysi biri noto'g'ri tahlil qilingan?
explanation: Bu gap noto'g'ri, chunki 'reading' (-ing shakli) harakatni bildiradi, demak 'are' bu yerda bog'lovchi emas, yordamchi fe'l bo'lishi kerak.

question_text: Choose the correct option: She ______ dance very well.
explanation: According to Card 2, 'can' is used to express ability and it remains the same for all persons (I, you, he, she, they).

question_text: Select the correct form of the verb: You must ______ your room now.
explanation: Card 1 states that after modal verbs, the following verb must be without 'to' and without 's'.

question_text: Which modal verb is best for giving friendly advice?
explanation: Card 4 explains that 'should' is used to show that something is good or right to do, which is the simplest way to give friendly advice.

question_text: Identify the sentence where 'have to' represents an external rule.
options: We have to follow the traffic rules.
correct_answer: We have to follow the traffic rules.
explanation: Card 3 clarifies that 'have to' is used for external rules, unlike 'must' which is for personal decisions.

question_text: Choose the correct completion: Yesterday, I ______ finish the report because my boss ordered it.
explanation: According to Card 3, 'must' cannot change, but 'have to' can change to 'had to' when talking about the past.

question_text: Choose the correct option: ______ you swim in the pool?
explanation: Card 2 states that 'can' is used for ability, which fits the context of asking about someone's ability to swim.

question_text: Which of these is the correct grammatical structure according to Card 1?
explanation: Card 1 specifies that modal verbs are followed by a verb without 'to' and without 's' at the end.

question_text: If you are talking about a school regulation (an external rule) in the past, which word should you use?
explanation: Card 3 states that 'have to' refers to external rules and it can change to 'had to' for the past tense.

question_text: Which sentence follows the rule of modal verbs correctly?
explanation: Card 1 explains that modal verbs must be followed by a base verb without 'to' or 's', which is correctly applied in 'must run'.

question_text: Complete the sentence: 'I think you ______ apologize to your teacher.' (Giving advice)
explanation: Card 4 explains that 'should' is used when giving advice, as it is not a strict obligation.

question_text: I can buy a red pen ___ a blue pen. Which one do you want?
explanation: Ushbu gapda ikkita variant (qizil qalam yoki ko'k qalam) orasidan tanlov qilish so'ralmoqda. Kartochka 4 ga ko'ra, tanlov bog'lovchisi 'or' hisoblanadi.

question_text: She likes singing ___ dancing in her free time.
explanation: Kartochka 1 ga ko'ra, 'and' so'zi so'zlarni bir-biriga yelim kabi yopishtiradi. Bu yerda ikkita yoqtirgan mashg'ulotni birlashtirish uchun 'and' kerak.

question_text: I ate my lunch ___ I was very hungry.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'because' sababni natija bilan bog'laydi. Men tushlik qildim, chunki och edim (sabab ko'rsatilgan).

question_text: The pizza was delicious, ___ it was very expensive.
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, agar fikr zid bo'lsa (mazali bo'lishi ijobiy, qimmat bo'lishi salbiy), 'but' ishlatiladi.

question_text: You can travel by bus ___ you can go by train to reach the city center.
explanation: Gapda shahar markaziga borish uchun ikkita turli variant taklif etilmoqda. Kartochka 4 ga binoan, variantlar orasidagi tanlov uchun 'or' ishlatiladi.

question_text: I studied hard for the exam, ___ I did not get a good grade.
explanation: Qattiq o'qish ijobiy harakat, yomon baho olish esa salbiy natija. Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, qarama-qarshi ma'nolarni 'but' bog'laydi.

question_text: He wears a jacket ___ it is cold outside.
explanation: Jacket kiyishning sababi sovuq ob-havodir. Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, sababni bildirish uchun 'because' bog'lovchisidan foydalanamiz.

question_text: We bought vegetables ___ fruits at the supermarket.
explanation: Kartochka 1 ga muvofiq, 'and' so'zi gapdagi so'zlarni bir-biriga bog'lab, mazmunli qiladi. Sabzavotlar va mevalar sanalmoqda.

question_text: I wanted to call you, ___ my phone battery was dead.
explanation: Telefon qila olmaganimning sababi batareyaning o'chib qolishi. Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, sababni natijaga 'because' bilan bog'laymiz.

question_text: The movie was long, ___ it was very interesting.
explanation: Filmning uzun bo'lishi odatda zerikarli deb qaraladi (salbiy), lekin qiziqarli bo'lishi ijobiy. Zid ma'noni bog'lash uchun Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra 'but' ishlatamiz.

question_text: ______ is a good way to relax. (Choose the Gerund form)
explanation: Kartochka 1 ga ko'ra, Gerund fe'lga '-ing' qo'shish orqali yasaladi va gapda ega vazifasida kela oladi.

question_text: I hope ______ you soon.
explanation: Kartochka 4 ga ko'ra, 'hope' fe'lidan keyin faqat 'to + fe'l' shakli (Infinitive) ishlatiladi.

question_text: She enjoys ______ pictures.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'enjoy' fe'lidan keyin faqat Gerund (-ing shakli) ishlatiladi.

question_text: He decided ______ a new car.
explanation: Kartochka 4 ga ko'ra, 'decide' fe'lidan keyin faqat 'to + fe'l' shakli keladi.

question_text: Would you mind ______ the window?
explanation: Kartochka 3 da keltirilgan 'mind' fe'lidan keyin faqat Gerund shakli ishlatilishi kerak.

question_text: They plan ______ to the mountains next week.
explanation: Kartochka 4 ga binoan, 'plan' fe'li o'zidan keyin Infinitive (to + fe'l) shaklini talab qiladi.

question_text: You should avoid ______ late at night.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'avoid' fe'lidan keyin fe'lning '-ing' shakli (Gerund) kelishi shart.

question_text: I want ______ English fluently.
explanation: Kartochka 4 ga ko'ra, 'want' fe'li o'zidan keyin har doim 'to + fe'l' shaklini talab qiladi.

question_text: After he finished ______ his homework, he went out.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'finish' fe'lidan keyin Gerund shakli ishlatiladi, shuning uchun 'doing' to'g'ri javob.

question_text: My goal is ______ a doctor. I am working hard for it.
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, maqsadni ifodalash uchun fe'lning 'to + fe'l' (Infinitive) shakli ishlatiladi.

question_text: Quyidagi so'zlardan qaysi biri ot yasovchi qo'shimcha yordamida hosil qilingan?
explanation: Teach fe'liga -er qo'shimchasi qo'shilib, 'o'qituvchi' degan ot hosil qilingan. Bu 2-kartochkadagi qoidaga mos keladi.

question_text: Quyidagi qaysi so'z 'o'qituvchi' ma'nosidagi otni anglatadi?
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, -er qo'shimchasi fe'lga qo'shilib, odamni bildiruvchi ot yasaydi. Teach (o'qitmoq) + er = Teacher.

question_text: Quyidagi so'zlarning qaysi biri sifat yasovchi qo'shimchaga ega?
explanation: Use so'ziga -ful qo'shimchasi qo'shilib, sifat yasalgan. -ful qo'shimchasi 3-kartochkaga ko'ra sifat yasovchi hisoblanadi.

question_text: Qaysi qo'shimcha yordamida sifatga 'biror holatga keltirmoq' ma'nosidagi fe'l yasaladi?
explanation: Kartochka 4 ga ko'ra, fe'l yasash uchun -en yoki -ize qo'shimchalari ishlatiladi va bu 'biror holatga keltirmoq' ma'nosini bildiradi.

question_text: Fe'l yasovchi -ize qo'shimchasini quyidagilardan qaysi biriga qo'shish to'g'ri bo'ladi?
explanation: Simple sifatiga -ize qo'shimchasini qo'shib, 'soddalashtirmoq' fe'lini yasash mumkin. Bu 4-kartochkadagi fe'l yasovchi qoidaga mos.

question_text: Sifatlarga -ful qo'shimchasini qo'shganda, u qanday ma'noni anglatadi?
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga muvofiq, -ful qo'shimchasi 'bor' degan ma'noni anglatadi (masalan, careful - g'amxo'rligi bor).

question_text: '-less' qo'shimchasi qanday ma'noni anglatadi?
explanation: 3-kartochkaga ko'ra, -less qo'shimchasi 'yo'q' degan ma'noni anglatadi (masalan, careless - beparvo).

question_text: Quyidagi so'zlardan qaysi biri 'baxt' otini ifodalaydi?
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, -ness qo'shimchasi sifatga qo'shilib, holatni bildiruvchi ot yasaydi: Happy + ness = Happiness.

question_text: Agar 'Art' (san'at) so'zidan 'san'atkor' so'zini yasamoqchi bo'lsak, qaysi qo'shimchani tanlaymiz?
explanation: 2-kartochkaga ko'ra, -ist qo'shimchasi odamlarni (kasbni) bildiruvchi otlar yasaydi. Shuning uchun Artist so'zi to'g'ri.

question_text: Power (kuch) so'zidan 'kuchsiz' ma'nosini anglatuvchi sifatni hosil qiling.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, -less qo'shimchasi 'yo'q' degan ma'noni bildiradi. Power + less = Powerless (kuchi yo'q/kuchsiz).

question_text: Qaysi qatorda -en qo'shimchasi orqali to'g'ri fe'l yasalgan?
explanation: 4-kartochkaga ko'ra, -en qo'shimchasi sifatdan fe'l yasaydi. Dark (qorong'u) sifatiga -en qo'shilib, 'qorong'ulashmoq' fe'li hosil bo'ladi.

question_text: Art (san'at) so'ziga qaysi qo'shimchani qo'shib, 'san'atkor' (kasb egasi) otini yasash mumkin?
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, -ist qo'shimchasi kasbni bildiruvchi otlar yasash uchun ishlatiladi: Art + ist = Artist.

question_text: Quyidagi qatordan 'holat'ni bildiruvchi otni toping:
explanation: 2-kartochkaga ko'ra, -ness qo'shimchasi holatni bildiruvchi otlar yasaydi. Sad (xafa) + ness = Sadness.

question_text: Dark (qorong'u) sifatidan 'qorong'ulashmoq/qorong'u qilmoq' fe'lini hosil qiling.
explanation: Kartochka 4 ga ko'ra, -en qo'shimchasi sifatga qo'shilib, 'biror holatga keltirmoq' ma'nosidagi fe'lni hosil qiladi: Dark + en = Darken.

question_text: '-able' qo'shimchasi qaysi turkumga tegishli so'z yasaydi?
explanation: 3-kartochkaga ko'ra, -able qo'shimchasi ot yoki fe'llarga qo'shilib sifat yasaydi.

question_text: Quyidagi qaysi so'z biror narsaga ega bo'lish yoki 'bor' sifatini anglatadi?
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, -ful qo'shimchasi 'bor' ma'nosini anglatadi. Hope (umid) + ful = Hopeful (umidi bor).

question_text: Qaysi so'z qatori faqat fe'l yasovchi qo'shimchalar yordamida hosil qilingan?
explanation: 4-kartochkaga ko'ra, -en va -ize fe'l yasovchi qo'shimchalardir. Shuning uchun Widen va Modernize fe'llardir.

question_text: Quyidagi qatorlarning qaysi birida ot yasovchi qo'shimcha noto'g'ri tushuntirilgan?
explanation: Kartochka 4 ga ko'ra, -en qo'shimchasi fe'l yasash uchun ishlatiladi, odamni bildiruvchi ot yasash uchun emas.

question_text: Agar 'Power' (kuch) so'zidan 'kuchsiz' sifatini yasamoqchi bo'lsak, qaysi qo'shimchani tanlaymiz?
explanation: 3-kartochkaga ko'ra, -less qo'shimchasi 'yo'q' degan ma'noni anglatadi. Power + less = Powerless (kuchsiz).

question_text: Stabil (barqaror) so'zini fe'lga aylantirmoqchi bo'lsangiz, qaysi variant to'g'ri bo'ladi?
explanation: Kartochka 4 ga ko'ra, fe'l yasash uchun -ize qo'shimchasi ishlatiladi: Stabil + ize = Stabilize.

question_text: Choose the correct option: I ____ to school every day.
explanation: Since 'every day' indicates a routine or a habit, we use Present Simple. For the subject 'I', we use the base form 'walk'.

question_text: Choose the correct option: Look! It ____ outside right now.
explanation: The word 'Look!' and 'right now' indicate that the action is happening at this very second, so we must use Present Continuous.

question_text: Choose the correct option: She ____ English every morning.
explanation: The phrase 'every morning' refers to a permanent habit, so we use Present Simple. For 'She', the verb takes the '-s' suffix.

question_text: Choose the correct option: Listen! The baby ____.
explanation: The word 'Listen!' indicates that the action is happening right now, which requires the Present Continuous form 'is crying'.

question_text: Find the correct sentence describing a fact.
options: The earth is moving around the sun.
The earth moves around the sun.
The earth move around the sun.
The earth are moving around the sun.
correct_answer: The earth moves around the sun.
explanation: Scientific facts that do not change over time require Present Simple. 'The earth' acts as a singular subject, so 'moves' is correct.

question_text: Choose the correct completion: My father usually drinks tea, but now he ____ coffee.
explanation: The word 'now' specifies that the action is happening at this moment, which requires Present Continuous ('is drinking').

question_text: Identify the mistake in this sentence: 'They is playing football now.'
explanation: The subject 'They' requires the auxiliary verb 'are' in Present Continuous, not 'is'. The action is happening now, so '-ing' is necessary.

question_text: Complete the sentence: My brother ____ books every evening.
explanation: The phrase 'every evening' indicates a repetitive habit. In Present Simple, the third-person singular 'brother' requires the '-s' ending.

question_text: Which sentence correctly uses Present Simple for a permanent fact?
explanation: Facts that are always true are expressed in Present Simple. 'Water' is an uncountable noun, so we add '-s' to the verb.

question_text: Complete the contrast: I always ____ to work, but today I ____ by bus.
explanation: The word 'always' indicates a habit (Present Simple: 'walk'), while 'today' and the context imply an action happening now (Present Continuous: 'am going').

question_text: I __________ to the park yesterday.
explanation: Past Simple tugagan ishni bildiradi, shuning uchun noto'g'ri fe'lning 2-shkli 'went' ishlatiladi.

question_text: They __________ dinner at 7 PM last night.
explanation: O'tgan zamonda ma'lum bir vaqtda (7 PM) davom etayotgan jarayon uchun Past Continuous (were + ing) ishlatiladi.

question_text: She __________ a letter to her friend last week.
explanation: O'tgan zamonda tugagan aniq harakatni ifodalash uchun Past Simple'ning 2-shkli 'wrote' to'g'ri keladi.

question_text: We __________ in the garden when it started to rain.
explanation: Davom etayotgan jarayonni tasvirlash uchun 'we' olmoshi bilan 'were working' ishlatiladi.

question_text: I __________ my room when my mother called me.
explanation: Telefon qo'ng'irog'i (qisqa harakat) jarayonni to'xtatganligi sababli, jarayon qismi Past Continuous'da bo'lishi kerak.

question_text: While I __________ a book, my brother __________ games.
explanation: Ikki voqea bir vaqtning o'zida sodir bo'layotganligi uchun 'while' bilan birga ikkala qismda ham Past Continuous ishlatiladi.

question_text: He __________ the door when he heard a noise.
explanation: Eshikni qulflayotgan jarayon shovqin eshitilishi bilan to'satdan bo'linganligi uchun Past Continuous ishlatiladi.

question_text: They __________ their project while I __________ my homework.
explanation: Ikkala tomon ham bir vaqtda davom etayotgan jarayon bo'lgani uchun har ikkala qismda Past Continuous (were/was + ing) qo'llanadi.

question_text: The lights went out while we __________ dinner.
explanation: Chiroq o'chishi to'satdan bo'lgan qisqa harakat, ovqatlanish esa davom etayotgan jarayon bo'lgani uchun jarayon qismiga 'were having' qo'yiladi.

question_text: I __________ the dishes when I __________ my finger.
explanation: Idish yuvish jarayon (Past Continuous), barmoqni kesib olish esa to'satdan sodir bo'lgan qisqa harakat (Past Simple) hisoblanadi.

question_text: Choose the correct form: She ________ her room.
explanation: Present Perfect zamonida 'She' olmoshi bilan 'has' yordamchi fe'li va fe'lning 3-shakli (V3) ishlatiladi.

question_text: Which sentence uses the correct word for a question?
explanation: Kartochkaga ko'ra, 'yet' so'zi inkor va so'roq gaplarda ishlatiladi.

question_text: Complete the sentence: They ________ their breakfast.
explanation: 'They' olmoshi bilan 'have' ishlatiladi va 'eat' fe'lining 3-shakli 'eaten' hisoblanadi.

question_text: Which sentence correctly uses 'just'?
explanation: Present Perfect qoidasiga ko'ra, 'have/has' yordamchi fe'lidan so'ng 'just' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Select the correct sentence with 'already':
options: We have already watched this movie.
We already have watched this movie.
We has already watched this movie.
We have watched already this movie.
correct_answer: We have already watched this movie.
explanation: 'We' olmoshi bilan 'have' ishlatiladi va 'already' so'zi yordamchi fe'ldan keyin keladi.

question_text: Identify the incorrect sentence:
explanation: Ushbu gapda xatolik bor, chunki 'She' olmoshi bilan 'have' emas, 'has' ishlatilishi shart.

question_text: Choose the correct version of the irregular verb in Present Perfect: He ________ to the park.
explanation: 'Go' fe'lining 3-shakli 'gone' hisoblanadi va 'He' uchun 'has' yordamchi fe'li ishlatiladi.

question_text: Complete the sentence based on the result meaning: I am sad because I ________ my phone.
explanation: Present Perfect natijasi hozirda muhim bo'lgan ishlar uchun ishlatiladi; 'I' uchun 'have' va 'lose' fe'lining 3-shakli 'lost' tanlanadi.

question_text: Which option is grammatically correct for a negative sentence?
options: She has not done it yet.
She have not done it yet.
She has not done it already.
She has not done it just.
correct_answer: She has not done it yet.
explanation: Inkor gaplarda hali ma'nosini beruvchi 'yet' so'zi ishlatiladi va 'She' uchun 'has' to'g'ri yordamchi fe'ldir.

question_text: Select the correct sentence:
explanation: Ushbu gapda 'You' bilan 'have' ishlatilgan va 'see' fe'lining 3-shakli 'seen' to'g'ri qo'llanilgan.

question_text: Choose the correct form to complete the sentence: By the time we reached the cinema, the film _________.
explanation: Past Perfect (had + V3) is used for the action that happened first. Since the film started before we reached the cinema, we use 'had started'.

question_text: Which sentence correctly uses the Past Perfect tense?
options: She has finished her work before she left.
She had finished her work before she left.
She finish her work before she had left.
She had finish her work before she left.
correct_answer: She had finished her work before she left.
explanation: According to the rules, Past Perfect is 'had + V3'. 'Finished' is the V3 form, so 'had finished' is the correct structure.

question_text: Complete the sentence: When I got to the party, my friend _________ already home.
explanation: The friend leaving is the first action in the past, so we use 'had' + V3 (gone).

question_text: What is the negative form of 'She had completed the task'?
options: She had not completed the task.
She didn't had completed the task.
correct_answer: She had not completed the task.
explanation: To make a negative sentence in Past Perfect, we add 'not' to 'had' (had + not + V3).

question_text: Choose the correct option: _________ you locked the door before you left the house?
explanation: In a question sentence for Past Perfect, 'had' moves to the beginning of the sentence.

question_text: Identify the correct structure: By the time the police arrived, the thief _________.
explanation: The thief escaping happened before the police arrived, therefore 'had + V3' (had escaped) is required.

question_text: Select the correct sentence based on the rule that the first action takes Past Perfect:
options: I had eaten dinner after I came home.
I ate dinner after I had come home.
I had eaten dinner before I came home.
I ate dinner before I had came home.
correct_answer: I had eaten dinner before I came home.
explanation: The action of eating happened first, so it requires 'had + V3', while the second action 'came' remains in Past Simple.

question_text: Choose the correct form: 'No, I hadn't _________ the message before he called.'
explanation: The formula for Past Perfect is 'had/hadn't + V3'. 'Seen' is the third form (V3) of the verb 'see'.

question_text: Which of these sentences correctly explains the usage of Past Perfect?
options: It describes two events happening at the same time.
It shows the second event in the past.
It indicates the action that finished first in the past.
It is only used for future events.
correct_answer: It indicates the action that finished first in the past.
explanation: As stated in Card 1, Past Perfect is used to show the action that was completed first among two events in the past.

question_text: Analyze the sentence: 'After the teacher had explained the lesson, we started the test.' Which event happened first?
options: Both happened at the same time.
explanation: The teacher explaining the lesson is in the Past Perfect form ('had explained'), which indicates it is the first action to be completed.

question_text: Tanlang: 'Look! My brother ________ football in the yard right now.'
explanation: Harakat fe'llari (dynamic verbs) jismoniy harakatni bildiradi va jarayon davom etayotgani uchun Continuous zamonda, ya'ni 'is playing' shaklida ishlatiladi.

question_text: Quyidagi gaplardan qaysi biri grammatik jihatdan to'g'ri?
explanation: 'Like' - bu holat (stative) fe'li bo'lib, uni Continuous zamonlarda (ing) ishlatib bo'lmaydi. Shu sababli Simple zamon shakli to'g'ri hisoblanadi.

question_text: Quyidagi gapni to'ldiring: 'I ________ this book very much.'
explanation: 'Like' - bu his-tuyg'uni bildiruvchi holat fe'li (stative verb). Kartochka 2 va 3 ga ko'ra, stative fe'llar Continuous zamonda ishlatilmaydi.

question_text: Bo'sh joyni to'ldiring: 'I ____ the answer to your question.'
explanation: 'Know' fe'li fikrlashni bildiruvchi stative fe'l bo'lib, u -ing qo'shimchasi bilan ishlatilmaydi.

question_text: Qaysi gap grammatik jihatdan to'g'ri?
explanation: 'Own' fe'li mulkni bildiradi va stative fe'l hisoblanadi. Shuning uchun u Continuous emas, balki Simple zamonda ishlatilishi kerak.

question_text: Quyidagi gaplardan qaysi biri xato?
options: I am hating the cold weather.
correct_answer: I am hating the cold weather.
explanation: 'Hate' - his-tuyg'uni bildiruvchi stative fe'l. Uni -ing qo'shimchasi bilan ishlatish qoidaga zid.

question_text: Quyidagi gapni to'ldiring: 'She ________ a new dress today.'
explanation: Kiyim kiyish - bu jismoniy harakat (dynamic verb). Kartochka 1 ga ko'ra, harakat fe'llarini Continuous zamonlarda ishlatishimiz mumkin.

question_text: Quyidagi fe'llardan qaysi biri 'Stative' fe'lga misol bo'la oladi?
explanation: 'Own' egalikni bildiruvchi stative fe'l hisoblanadi, qolgan variantlar esa jismoniy harakatni bildiruvchi dynamic fe'llardir.

question_text: Quyidagi gapni to'ldiring: 'I ________ that he is a very kind person.'
explanation: 'Believe' fe'li fikrlash bilan bog'liq holat fe'li (stative verb) bo'lib, u doim Simple zamonlarda ishlatiladi.

question_text: To'g'ri variantni tanlang: 'John ____ a new bicycle.'
explanation: Bu gapda 'have' egalikni bildiradi, shuning uchun u stative fe'l hisoblanadi va Simple zamonda ishlatilishi kerak.

question_text: Tanlang: 'Listen! The baby ________ because she is hungry.'
explanation: Yig'lash - bu jismoniy jarayon va harakat fe'li (dynamic verb). Shuning uchun u Continuous shaklda ishlatiladi.

question_text: Quyidagi gaplardan qaysi biri 'Dynamic' fe'lni o'z ichiga oladi?
explanation: 'Eat' jismoniy ish-harakatni bildiruvchi dynamic fe'l bo'lib, uni Continuous zamonda (eating) ishlatish mumkin.

question_text: Quyidagi gapni to'ldiring: 'Do you ________ what I am saying?'
explanation: 'Understand' fe'li fikrlash bilan bog'liq holat fe'li (stative verb) hisoblanadi, shuning uchun u 'are understanding' emas, 'understand' bo'ladi.

question_text: Bo'sh joyni to'ldiring: 'Look! Sarah ____ her breakfast now.'
explanation: Bu yerda 'have' egalikni emas, nonushta qilish jarayonini bildiradi. Istisno holatiga ko'ra, jarayonni bildirsa, uni -ing bilan ishlatish to'g'ri.

question_text: Qaysi gapda 'think' fe'li harakatni (dynamic) anglatadi?
options: I am thinking about my project now.
I think this cake is delicious.
I think she knows the truth.
correct_answer: I am thinking about my project now.
explanation: Kartochka 4 ga ko'ra, 'think' fe'li biror narsa haqida fikr yuritish (jarayon) bo'lsa, u dynamic fe'l bo'lib Continuous zamonda ishlatiladi.

question_text: Qaysi gapda stative fe'ldan xato foydalanilgan?
options: Do you belong to this club?
explanation: 'Love' his-tuyg'u fe'li bo'lib, uni Continuous zamonda (-ing) ishlatish mumkin emas. To'g'ri shakli 'I love this song' bo'lishi kerak.

question_text: Quyidagi gaplardan qaysi biri noto'g'ri?
explanation: 'Know' - bu fikrlash bilan bog'liq holat fe'li (stative verb). Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, stative fe'llar Continuous zamonda ishlatilmaydi, shuning uchun bu gap xato.

question_text: Qaysi gapda 'have' fe'li stative (egalik) ma'nosida ishlatilgan?
explanation: Egalikni bildiradigan fe'llar stative hisoblanadi va Simple zamonda (has) ishlatiladi. Boshqa variantlarda 'have' harakat yoki jarayon ma'nosida kelgan.

question_text: Tanlang: 'I ________ this song; it is very beautiful.'
explanation: 'Prefer' - his-tuyg'uni bildiruvchi holat fe'li (stative verb). U faqat Simple zamonda ishlatiladi va Continuous shaklga ega emas.

question_text: Qaysi jumla stative va dynamic fe'llar qoidasiga to'liq mos keladi?
options: I am knowing the truth, so I eat lunch.
I know the truth, so I am eating lunch.
I am knowing the truth, so I am eating lunch.
I know the truth, so I eat lunch (but not now).
correct_answer: I know the truth, so I am eating lunch.
explanation: 'Know' - stative (Simple bo'lishi shart), 'eat' - dynamic (hozirgi jarayon uchun Continuous bo'lishi mumkin). Shu sababli ikkinchi variant to'g'ri.

question_text: I ___ my report yesterday.
explanation: Gapda 'yesterday' so'zi bor, bu aniq vaqtni bildiradi. Kartochka 1 va 3-ga ko'ra, aniq vaqt bo'lsa, Past Simple ishlatamiz.

question_text: I ____ my car yesterday.
explanation: Gapda 'yesterday' so'zi bor, bu aniq o'tmish vaqtini bildiradi. Kartochka 1 va 3 ga ko'ra, aniq vaqt ko'rsatkichlari bilan Past Simple ishlatiladi.

question_text: Look! Somebody ___ the window.
explanation: Gapda natija (derazaning singanligi) muhim va aniq vaqt ko'rsatilmagan. Kartochka 2-ga ko'ra, bu holatda Present Perfect ishlatiladi.

question_text: She ____ already ____ her dinner.
explanation: Gapda 'already' so'zi ishlatilgan. Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'already' bo'lsa Present Perfect ishlatiladi.

question_text: They ___ to London in 2015.
explanation: 2015 yili aniq vaqt hisoblanadi. Kartochka 1 va 3-ga ko'ra, aniq vaqt bilan Past Simple ishlatiladi.

question_text: We ____ to London in 2015.
explanation: Gapda 'in 2015' aniq vaqt ko'rsatilgan. Kartochka 1 ga ko'ra, aniq vaqt bo'lsa Past Simple tanlanadi.

question_text: I ___ my lunch already, so I am not hungry.
explanation: Gapda 'already' so'zi mavjud va natija (qorin och emasligi) muhim. Kartochka 3-ga ko'ra, 'already' bilan Present Perfect ishlatiladi.

question_text: He ____ just ____ the room.
explanation: Gapda 'just' so'zi bor. Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'just' ishlatilganda Present Perfect shakli to'g'ri bo'ladi.

question_text: My brother ___ his phone. He cannot find it anywhere.
explanation: Telefonning yo'qolishi natijasida u hozir topilmayapti. Kartochka 2-ga ko'ra, natija muhim bo'lgani uchun Present Perfect ishlatamiz.

question_text: My father ____ a new laptop two days ago.
explanation: Gapda 'two days ago' aniq o'tmish vaqti berilgan. Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'ago' bo'lsa Past Simple ishlatamiz.

question_text: She ___ a letter to her friend last week.
explanation: Gapda 'last week' aniq vaqt ko'rsatkichi bor. Kartochka 1 va 3-ga ko'ra, aniq vaqt bo'lganda Past Simple ishlatiladi.

question_text: They ____ their project yet.
explanation: Gapda 'yet' so'zi mavjud. Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'yet' Present Perfect zamoniga xosdir.

question_text: I ___ this movie, it is very interesting.
explanation: Gapda 'just' so'zi ishlatilgan. Kartochka 3-ga ko'ra, 'just' so'zi bo'lsa, Present Perfect ishlatiladi.

question_text: Look! I ____ my umbrella.
explanation: Gapda aniq vaqt ko'rsatilmagan va natija muhim (soyabon topildi). Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, bunday holatda Present Perfect ishlatiladi.

question_text: We ___ at 5 o'clock yesterday.
explanation: 'at 5 o'clock' aniq vaqt hisoblanadi. Kartochka 3-ga ko'ra, aniq vaqt bilan faqat Past Simple ishlatamiz.

question_text: I ____ a very interesting movie last night.
explanation: Gapda 'last night' aniq vaqt ko'rsatkichi mavjud. Kartochka 1 ga ko'ra, aniq o'tmish vaqti bilan Past Simple ishlatiladi.

question_text: He ___ his homework yet.
explanation: Gapda 'yet' so'zi bor. Kartochka 3-ga ko'ra, 'yet' so'zi bilan Present Perfect ishlatiladi.

question_text: She ____ her wallet, so she cannot pay for the ticket now.
explanation: Hozir to'lay olmaslik natijasi muhim. Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, natija muhim bo'lgan va aniq vaqt aytilmagan gaplarda Present Perfect ishlatiladi.

question_text: My father ___ this house in 2010.
explanation: 2010 yil aniq vaqt ko'rsatkichi bo'lgani uchun Kartochka 1 va 3 qoidasiga binoan Past Simple zamonida yozishimiz kerak.

question_text: I ____ the document three hours ago, but I don't know where it is now.
explanation: Garchi gapning ikkinchi qismida natija haqida so'z ketsa ham, birinchi qismda 'three hours ago' degan aniq vaqt bor. Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'ago' bo'lsa Past Simple tanlaymiz.

question_text: They __________ (study) English all day.
explanation: Formula bo'yicha 'they' uchun 'have been' ishlatiladi va asosiy fe'lga '-ing' qo'shiladi.

question_text: They ____ football for two hours.
explanation: I/you/we/they uchun 'have' ishlatiladi. Davomiylikni bildirish uchun 'have + been + fe'l+ing' formulasi to'g'ri keladi.

question_text: She __________ (wait) for an hour.
explanation: Uchinchi shaxs birlik ('she') uchun 'has been' yordamchi fe'li va '-ing' qo'shimchasi talab qilinadi.

question_text: He ____ English since 9 o'clock.
explanation: 'He' uchun 'has' ishlatiladi va harakat davom etayotgani uchun 'been + ing' shakli tanlanadi.

question_text: I have been living here __________ 2022.
explanation: '2022' yil boshlanish nuqtasi bo'lgani uchun 'since' so'zi ishlatiladi.

question_text: I ____ this book for an hour.
explanation: 'I' uchun 'have' ishlatiladi. 'Have + been + reading' formulasi hozir ham davom etayotgan harakatni ifodalaydi.

question_text: He __________ (work) in the garden for three hours.
explanation: 'He' olmoshi 'has' yordamchi fe'lini talab qiladi va davomiy harakat uchun 'been working' ishlatiladi.

question_text: We ____ here since last Monday.
explanation: 'We' olmoshi bilan 'have' ishlatiladi va harakatning boshlanish nuqtasi 'since' orqali berilgan.

question_text: We __________ (run) for twenty minutes.
explanation: 'We' uchun 'have been' ishlatiladi va fe'lga '-ing' qo'shilib 'running' hosil bo'ladi.

question_text: She ____ well lately.
explanation: Inkor gaplarda 'has/have'dan keyin 'not' qo'shiladi va 'she' uchun 'hasn't' ishlatiladi.

question_text: My friend __________ (play) computer games since the morning.
explanation: 'My friend' (u) birlikda bo'lgani uchun 'has' ishlatiladi, jarayon davom etayotgani uchun 'been playing' to'g'ri.

question_text: They ____ television for three hours.
explanation: Gap ijobiy shaklda bo'lishi kerak. 'They' uchun 'have' va davomli harakat uchun 'been + watching' ishlatiladi.

question_text: I have been reading this article __________ three hours.
explanation: 'Three hours' bu vaqt davomiyligi (muddat) hisoblangani uchun 'for' ishlatiladi.

question_text: My friend ____ hard since morning.
explanation: 'My friend' birlikda (he/she) bo'lgani uchun 'has' yordamchi fe'li hamda 'been working' ishlatiladi.

question_text: It __________ (rain) since 2 o'clock.
explanation: 'It' uchun 'has been' ishlatiladi va fe'lga '-ing' qo'shilib 'raining' bo'ladi.

question_text: I ____ TV since I came home.
explanation: Harakat o'tmishda boshlanib, hozir ham davom etayotgani uchun 'have been + ing' shakli to'g'ri.

question_text: Which sentence is grammatically correct according to the rules?
options: They has been waiting for an hour.
She have been studying since 5 o'clock.
We have been working for two days.
I has been reading for a week.
correct_answer: We have been working for two days.
explanation: Faqat 'We have been working' qismi formula bo'yicha to'g'ri, qolganlarida 'have/has' mos kelmagan.

question_text: It ____ all day long.
explanation: 'It' olmoshi uchun 'has' ishlatiladi. Davomiylikni ifodalash uchun 'been + raining' shakli kerak.

question_text: Choose the correct completion: You __________ (listen) to music __________ a long time.
explanation: 'You' uchun 'have been' ishlatiladi va 'a long time' muddat bo'lgani uchun 'for' ishlatilishi shart.

question_text: They ____ since the exam started.
explanation: 'They' uchun 'have' ishlatiladi. Inkor shaklida 'haven't' va davomiy harakat uchun 'been + talking' to'g'ri keladi.

question_text: When I was a child, I _____ play with my toy cars every afternoon.
explanation: Would is used for repeated actions in the past, and 'play' is an action verb.

question_text: When I was a child, I _______ play with my dolls every afternoon.
explanation: Kartochka 1-ga ko'ra, o'tmishda tez-tez qilingan harakatlar uchun 'used to' ishlatiladi va u barcha shaxslar uchun bir xil shaklda qoladi.

question_text: Before moving to the capital, she _____ live in a small village.
explanation: Live is a state verb, and according to the rules, only 'used to' can be used with state verbs.

question_text: Which sentence is grammatically correct regarding the negative form?
options: I not used to eat fish.
I didn't used to eat fish.
I didn't use to eat fish.
I no used to eat fish.
correct_answer: I didn't use to eat fish.
explanation: Kartochka 4-ga ko'ra, inkor shaklida 'did' yordamchi fe'li ishlatiladi va 'used to'dagi 'd' harfi tushib qolib, 'use to' shakliga o'tadi.

question_text: Complete the negative sentence: I _____ like vegetables when I was younger.
explanation: In negative sentences, 'used to' loses the 'd' and we use the auxiliary verb 'did', resulting in 'didn't use to'.

question_text: Choose the correct option: She _______ have long hair when she was at school.
explanation: Kartochka 2-ga ko'ra, 'have' holat fe'li bo'lgani uchun u bilan faqat 'used to' ishlatiladi, 'would' esa bunday holatlarda ishlatilmaydi.

question_text: _____ you use to have a cat when you lived in Samarkand?
explanation: To form a question with 'used to', we use the auxiliary verb 'did' at the beginning.

question_text: _______ you use to play in the park every weekend?
explanation: Kartochka 4-ga muvofiq, savol shaklida 'did' yordamchi fe'li ishlatiladi va 'use to' o'zgarmasdan qoladi.

question_text: My grandfather _____ tell us amazing stories every Sunday evening.
explanation: Telling stories is a repeated action in the past, and 'would' is commonly used to describe such recurring actions in a narrative style.

question_text: Every morning, my father _______ drink coffee in the garden.
options: both used to and would are correct
correct_answer: both used to and would are correct
explanation: Kartochka 3-ga ko'ra, 'drink' harakat fe'li bo'lgani uchun takrorlanuvchi harakatlarni ifodalashda ham 'used to', ham 'would' ishlatilishi mumkin.

question_text: I _____ have long hair, but I cut it last year.
explanation: 'Have' is a state verb, so we must use 'used to' instead of 'would'.

question_text: Identify the incorrect sentence.
options: I used to live in London.
She would like animals very much.
We would visit our grandmother every summer.
correct_answer: She would like animals very much.
explanation: Kartochka 2-ga ko'ra, 'like' holat fe'li hisoblanadi, shuning uchun u bilan 'would' ishlatilmaydi.

question_text: Which sentence is grammatically correct?
options: I didn't use to know him.
correct_answer: I didn't use to know him.
explanation: In negative sentences, we use 'didn't use to'. The others are incorrect because they either use 'would' with state verbs or have wrong verb forms.

question_text: Select the sentence where 'would' is used correctly.
options: I would own a bike when I was ten.
They would be very happy in that house.
He would walk to school every morning.
correct_answer: He would walk to school every morning.
explanation: Kartochka 3-ga ko'ra, 'would' faqat 'walk' kabi harakat fe'llari bilan ishlatilishi mumkin, holat fe'llari bilan emas.

question_text: Every summer, we _____ go to the seaside for our vacation.
explanation: Going to the seaside is a repeated action in the past, making 'would' a correct choice here.

question_text: Complete the sentence: My brother _______ live in a small village, but now he lives in a city.
explanation: Kartochka 2-ga ko'ra, 'live' holat fe'li bo'lgani sababli faqat 'used to' mos keladi.

question_text: Identify the error: 'She would love her doll collection, but she gave it away.'
explanation: 'Love' is a state verb, so it cannot be used with 'would'. It should be 'used to love'.

question_text: Which of the following is true about 'used to' and 'would'?
options: Would can be used for both states and actions.
Used to can be used for actions, but not for states.
Used to can be used for both states and actions.
Neither can be used for actions.
correct_answer: Used to can be used for both states and actions.
explanation: Kartochka 2 va 3-ni birlashtirganda, 'used to' ham holat (be, have, live), ham harakat fe'llari bilan ishlata olinishi kelib chiqadi.

question_text: Choose the correct option: '_____ they use to go to the park every day?'
explanation: When forming a question with 'used to', we use the auxiliary verb 'did', and the 'd' from 'used' is dropped.

question_text: Choose the most appropriate option: 'Did they _______ visit their cousins in the village?'
explanation: Kartochka 4-ga muvofiq, savol gapda 'did' yordamchi fe'li kelganda 'used to'dagi 'd' tushib qoladi va 'use to' shakli ishlatiladi.

question_text: My friend ____ early, so he doesn't feel tired in the morning.
explanation: Kartochka 1 ga ko'ra, allaqachon ko'nikib bo'lgan holatda 'be used to' va undan keyin -ing qo'shimchasi ishlatiladi.

question_text: Choose the correct option: She is used to ______ tea instead of coffee.
explanation: According to the golden rule, after 'used to' a verb must end in '-ing'.

question_text: I started this new job a week ago, and I am ____ to the office routine.
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga muvofiq, yangi vaziyatga moslashish jarayoni uchun 'get used to' tuzilmasi qo'llanadi.

question_text: Which sentence describes a situation that you are already accustomed to?
options: I am getting used to work hard.
I am used to working hard.
I get used to work hard.
I am used to work hard.
correct_answer: I am used to working hard.
explanation: Card 1 states that 'be used to' describes a current situation that is already a habit, and Card 3 requires '-ing' after it.

question_text: She has lived here for ten years, so she ____ the noise of the traffic.
explanation: Uzoq vaqtdan beri bu yerda yashayotgani uchun u shovqinga ko'nikib bo'lgan, shuning uchun 'is used to' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Complete the sentence: I am ______ to the noise in this office; it doesn't bother me anymore.
explanation: Since the person is no longer bothered, they are already accustomed to the noise, so 'am used to' is the correct form.

question_text: It was difficult at first, but now I ____ to driving on the left.
explanation: Endi ko'nikib bo'lganlik (natija) haqida gapirilayotgani uchun 'am used to' to'g'ri keladi.

question_text: Identify the grammatically correct sentence:
options: He is used to read books.
He is used to reading books.
He is get used to reading books.
correct_answer: He is used to reading books.
explanation: Card 3 states that verbs following 'used to' must take the '-ing' suffix.

question_text: They just moved to a village, and they are ____ to the quiet life there.
explanation: Yangi vaziyatga endi moslashayotganlik jarayoni ifodalanayotgani uchun 'getting used to' ishlatiladi.

question_text: If you are in the middle of a process of becoming comfortable with something, which structure do you use?
explanation: Card 2 explains that 'get used to' describes a process that is just beginning or happening.

question_text: Choose the grammatically correct sentence:
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'to' predlogidan keyin fe'lga albatta -ing qo'shilishi kerak.

question_text: Choose the correct form: It was difficult at first, but finally, I ______ to the new system.
explanation: Card 4 explains that 'got used to' is used to describe that you eventually adapted to a process in the past.

question_text: I have been in this country for a month. I am ____ the local food.
explanation: Bir oylik davr - bu hali ko'nikish jarayoni, shuning uchun 'getting used to' va -ingli fe'l mos keladi.

question_text: Complete: 'I am ______ to driving on the left side of the road now.'
explanation: The word 'now' suggests the process is currently happening, which corresponds to the definition of 'get used to' in Card 2.

question_text: My father ____ waking up at 5:00 AM every day for his work.
explanation: Bu doimiy odat va allaqachon ko'nikib bo'lingan holat bo'lgani uchun 'is used to' tanlanadi.

question_text: Which of the following is correct?
options: They were used to walk in the park.
They were used to walking in the park.
They got used to walk in the park.
They are used to walked in the park.
correct_answer: They were used to walking in the park.
explanation: According to Card 4, 'were used to' shows a past state, and Card 3 requires an '-ing' verb after it.

question_text: Although the weather is hot here, I am ____ in this desert climate.
explanation: Issiq ob-havoga moslashish jarayoni davom etayotgani uchun 'getting used to' va -ingli fe'l ('living') ishlatiladi.

question_text: Analyze the difference: 'I am used to living here' vs 'I am getting used to living here'.
options: The first means it is already a habit, the second means the process is ongoing.
The first is past, the second is present.
correct_answer: The first means it is already a habit, the second means the process is ongoing.
explanation: Card 1 defines 'be used to' as an existing habit, while Card 2 defines 'get used to' as the process of adapting.

question_text: Identify the incorrect sentence according to the grammar rules provided:
options: I am used to the cold weather.
She is getting used to the new job.
They are used to play football.
He is used to working hard.
correct_answer: They are used to play football.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'to'dan keyin fe'lning o'zini ('play') ishlatish xato, to'g'ri shakli 'playing' bo'lishi kerak edi.

question_text: Complete the sentence: 'Last year, she moved to a village and finally ______ to the silence there.'
explanation: The context refers to a past completion of a process, making 'got used to' the correct form as per Card 4.

question_text: When the teacher entered the classroom, the students _______ (finish) their project.
explanation: Kartochka 1 ga binoan, ikkita o'tmish voqeasidan oldinroq sodir bo'lgan ish (loyihani tugatish) Past Perfect (had + V3) bilan ifodalanadi.

question_text: After he _____ his dinner, he went to bed.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'After' bog'lovchisidan keyin ish tugaganini ko'rsatish uchun Past Perfect (had + V3) ishlatiladi.

question_text: After she _______ (study) hard for the exam, she passed it with high grades.
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga muvofiq, 'After' bog'lovchisi qatnashgan gapda oldin sodir bo'lgan ish 'had + V3' shaklida beriladi.

question_text: When I got to the cinema, the movie _____ already.
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, 'when' dan keyin Past Simple keladi, voqealar ketma-ketligida esa oldinroq bo'lgan ish uchun Past Perfect ishlatiladi.

question_text: I was very tired because I _______ (walk) for five hours.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, o'tmishdagi natijaning (charchash) sababini tushuntirish uchun Past Perfect (had + V3) ishlatiladi.

question_text: I washed the dishes after I _____ lunch.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'after' so'zidan keyin ish tugaganligini bildirish uchun Past Perfect ishlatiladi.

question_text: Before he arrived at the office, he _______ (drink) a cup of coffee.
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga binoan, 'Before' bog'lovchisi bo'lganda ham oldinroq sodir bo'lgan ishga 'had + V3'ni ishlatish to'g'ri bo'ladi.

question_text: Before she went to work, she _____ her breakfast.
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, 'before' dan keyin Past Simple keladi, ikkinchi qismda esa natija sifatida Past Perfect ishlatiladi.

question_text: The film _______ (start) already when we got to the cinema.
explanation: Kartochka 1 ga muvofiq, kino boshlanishi biz yetib kelishimizdan oldin sodir bo'lgani uchun Past Perfect (had + V3) ishlatildi.

question_text: By the time the guests arrived, we _____ everything ready.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'By the time' iborasi Past Perfect bilan juda mos keladi va ish oldinroq tugaganligini bildiradi.

question_text: She didn't know the answer because she _______ (not/read) the book.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga binoan, bu yerda javobni bilmaslik natija, kitobni o'qimaslik esa sababdir, shuning uchun sabab qismida Past Perfect ishlatildi.

question_text: She _____ the room before the guests came.
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga muvofiq, mehmonlar kelgunicha (Past Simple) xona tozalanib bo'lgan edi, ya'ni bu oldingi ish bo'lgani uchun Past Perfect tanlanadi.

question_text: When they arrived at the airport, the plane _____ already.
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, 'when' dan keyin Past Simple ishlatiladi, samolyot esa ular yetib kelgunicha ketib bo'lgani uchun Past Perfect ishlatiladi.

question_text: After they _______ (clean) the house, they watched a movie.
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga asosan, 'After' bog'lovchisi ishlatilganda, birinchi bo'lib bajarilgan ish (tozalash) 'had + V3' shaklida bo'ladi.

question_text: I lost my keys because I _______ (be) very careless.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, kalitni yo'qotish natija, e'tiborsiz bo'lish esa uning sababidir, shu sababli sabab qismi Past Perfect (had + V3)da berildi.

question_text: By the time I checked my inbox, he _____ the email.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'By the time' iborasi Past Perfect bilan ishlatiladi, chunki xat yuborish ishi inbox tekshirilguncha sodir bo'lib bo'lgan.

question_text: By the time we reached the park, the rain _______ (stop).
explanation: Voqealar tartibiga ko'ra (Kartochka 1), yomg'ir to'xtashi biz yetib kelishimizdan oldin sodir bo'lgan, shuning uchun 'had + V3' ishlatildi.

question_text: He _____ home after he _____ the report.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga ko'ra, 'after'dan keyin Past Perfect, asosiy qismda esa ketma-ketlikni ko'rsatish uchun Past Simple ishlatiladi.

question_text: I couldn't call him because I _______ (forget) my phone at home.
explanation: Kartochka 3 ga binoan, qo'ng'iroq qila olmaslik (natija) telefonni unutib qoldirish (sabab) tufayli yuz bergan, shuning uchun sabab qismi 'had + V3' bo'ladi.

question_text: When the teacher _____ the class, the students _____ talking.
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, 'when'dan keyin Past Simple keladi. O'qituvchi kirgunicha, o'quvchilar gaplashishni to'xtatib bo'lishgani uchun ikkinchi qismda Past Perfect ishlatiladi.

question_text: Choose the correct form: 'They ________ (play) chess for an hour before it started to rain.'
explanation: Past Perfect Continuous shakli barcha shaxslar uchun 'had been' yordamchi fe'li va fe'lga '-ing' qo'shimchasini qo'shish orqali yasaladi.

question_text: Choose the correct form: 'They _____ (talk) for thirty minutes before the teacher entered the classroom.'
explanation: Ish o'tmishdagi voqeadan (o'qituvchining kirishi) oldin ma'lum vaqt davomida to'xtovsiz davom etganligi uchun 'had been' va fe'lga '-ing' qo'shimchasi ishlatiladi.

question_text: I was wet because I ________ (walk) in the rain for twenty minutes.
explanation: O'tmishdagi harakatning davomiyligini (qancha vaqt davom etganini) ifodalash uchun 'had been walking' shakli to'g'ri keladi.

question_text: Fill in the blank: 'She _____ (work) in the garden for two hours when it started to rain.'
explanation: O'tmishda boshlanib, boshqa o'tmishdagi voqeagacha (yomg'ir boshlanishi) davom etgan ishni bildirish uchun Past Perfect Continuous (had been working) ishlatiladi.

question_text: She ________ (read) a book before her brother arrived.
explanation: Formula bo'yicha 'had been' va fe'lning '-ing' shakli (reading) ishlatilishi shart.

question_text: Complete the sentence: 'We _____ (wait) for the bus since 8 o'clock yesterday morning.'
explanation: Yasalish qoidasiga ko'ra, barcha shaxslar uchun 'had been' va fe'lga '-ing' qo'shiladi. 'Since' so'zi ishning boshlanish nuqtasini ko'rsatadi.

question_text: We were hungry because we ________ (work) in the garden all morning.
explanation: O'tmishda ma'lum vaqt davom etgan harakat va uning natijasi (och qolish) uchun Past Perfect Continuous ishlatiladi.

question_text: Choose the correct sentence structure for Past Perfect Continuous:
explanation: Kartochka 2 ga ko'ra, Past Perfect Continuous yasash uchun 'had been' yordamchi fe'li va asosiy fe'lga '-ing' qo'shimchasi kerak.

question_text: Why was the ground wet? - Because it ________ (rain) for hours.
explanation: Ushbu zamon o'tmishda ta'siri sezilib turgan (ground was wet) davomli harakatlarni ifodalaydi.

question_text: Identify the correct option: 'I _____ (study) for my exam for four hours before I went to sleep.'
explanation: O'tmishdagi uxlash voqeasigacha ish 4 soat davomida to'xtovsiz davom etganini ifodalash uchun 'had been studying' to'g'ri keladi.

question_text: He ________ (talk) on the phone for 30 minutes when the battery died.
explanation: O'tmishdagi ikkita harakat solishtirilganda, uzoqroq davom etgan harakat uchun Past Perfect Continuous ishlatiladi.

question_text: Choose the correct option: 'He _____ (live) in Tashkent for ten years before he moved to Samarkand.'
explanation: Ish o'tmishdagi ko'chib ketish voqeasigacha ma'lum vaqt (10 yil) davomida davom etib kelganligini bildirish uchun 'had been living' ishlatiladi.

question_text: My eyes hurt because I ________ (look) at the screen all day.
explanation: O'tmishdagi ko'zlarning og'rishi holati butun kun davom etgan harakat (looking at the screen) oqibati hisoblanadi.

question_text: Select the right option: 'By the time the guests arrived, she _____ (clean) the house all morning.'
explanation: Mehmonlar kelguncha bo'lgan jarayon uzoq vaqt davom etgan va to'xtovsiz bo'lgani uchun Past Perfect Continuous shakli tanlanadi.

question_text: They ________ (study) for the exam all night before they finally slept.
explanation: Darsda o'tilgan formulaga ko'ra, 'had been' va '-ing' qo'shimchasi o'tgan zamondagi davomiy ish-harakat uchun ishlatiladi.

question_text: Which option is correct? 'The athletes _____ (run) for an hour before the rain began.'
explanation: Yugurish ishi o'tmishdagi voqea (yomg'ir) sodir bo'lguncha davom etib kelgan. 'For an hour' davomiylikni bildiradi.

question_text: The kitchen was a mess because the children ________ (cook) dinner.
explanation: Oshxonaning tartibsiz bo'lishi - bu o'tmishdagi harakatning (pishirish) ta'siridir. Shuning uchun Past Perfect Continuous tanlanadi.

question_text: Complete the sentence based on the rules: 'The baby _____ (cry) since midnight before the mother finally woke up.'
explanation: O'tmishdagi uyg'onish voqeasigacha chaqaloqning yig'lash harakati 'since midnight' nuqtasidan boshlab to'xtovsiz davom etgan.

question_text: Choose the correctly formed sentence.
options: She had been waiting for the bus.
She had waiting for the bus.
She have been waiting for the bus.
She had been wait for the bus.
correct_answer: She had been waiting for the bus.
explanation: Faqat birinchi variant 'had been' yordamchi fe'li va fe'lning '-ing' shakli ('waiting') qoidasiga to'liq mos keladi.

question_text: Choose the correct option for the context: 'They _____ (play) chess for two hours before it got dark.'
explanation: O'tmishdagi qorong'u tushish voqeasidan oldin shaxmat o'ynash harakati 'for two hours' davomida to'xtovsiz bo'lgani uchun 'had been playing' to'g'ri.

question_text: A: Oh, I forgot to buy milk! B: Don't worry, I ___ go to the shop right now.
explanation: Bu qaror gapirib turgan paytda to'satdan qabul qilinganligi uchun 'will' ishlatiladi.

question_text: I bought my plane tickets last month. I ___ travel to London next week.
explanation: Reja oldindan tayyorlangan va chiptalar sotib olingan, shuning uchun 'going to' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Look at the sky! It is full of dark clouds. It ___ rain soon.
explanation: Qora bulutlar yomg'ir yog'ishiga aniq isbot bo'lgani uchun 'is going to' ishlatamiz.

question_text: I think that humans ___ live on Mars in the future.
explanation: Bu shaxsiy fikr va bashorat bo'lgani uchun 'will' ishlatiladi.

question_text: A: Why are you taking your camera? B: I ___ take some photos in the park.
explanation: Kamera olish oldindan rejalashtirilgan ish ekanligini bildiradi, shuning uchun 'am going to' ishlatiladi.

question_text: (Telephone rings) A: The phone is ringing. B: I ___ answer it.
explanation: Telefon qo'ng'irog'iga javob berish to'satdan qilingan qaror bo'lgani uchun 'will' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Be careful! The ladder is broken. You ___ fall down.
explanation: Narvonning singanligi yiqilishga aniq isbot bo'lgani uchun 'are going to' ishlatamiz.

question_text: I have already decided. Tomorrow morning, I ___ start my new diet.
explanation: Ish oldindan rejalashtirilgan va qaror qabul qilinganligi uchun 'am going to' ishlatiladi.

question_text: A: Have you made up your mind about the party? B: Yes, I ___ wear my blue dress.
explanation: O'quvchi qarorini oldindan qabul qilib bo'lgan (made up your mind), shuning uchun 'going to' mos keladi.

question_text: Scientists believe that computers ___ become more intelligent than humans one day.
explanation: Bu shaxsiy fikr yoki kelajak haqidagi taxmin bo'lgani uchun 'will' ishlatiladi.

question_text: I __________ run very fast when I was younger.
explanation: Qobiliyatni ifodalash uchun 'can' modal fe'li ishlatiladi.

question_text: You look tired. You __________ sleep more.
explanation: Maslahat berish holatida 'should' ishlatiladi.

question_text: It is a strict rule. You __________ wear your uniform at school.
explanation: Qat'iy qoida va majburiyatni bildirish uchun 'must' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Choose the correct sentence:
explanation: Modal fe'llardan keyin asosiy fe'l hech qanday qo'shimchasiz va 'to'siz' keladi.

question_text: My sister is very talented. She __________ play the piano beautifully.
explanation: Bu yerda qobiliyat haqida so'z borayotgani uchun 'can' ishlatiladi.

question_text: You have a cold. You __________ see a doctor.
explanation: Birovga foydali yo'l-yo'riq ko'rsatish yoki maslahat berish uchun 'should' mos keladi.

question_text: The exam is very important. I __________ study hard to pass it.
explanation: O'zing uchun belgilagan muhim vazifa bo'lgani uchun 'must' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Identify the grammatically correct sentence:
explanation: Modal fe'llardan keyin fe'l hech qanday o'zgarishsiz (to'siz) kelishi kerak.

question_text: Which option is incorrect according to the grammar rules?
options: She must to finish her work.
correct_answer: She must to finish her work.
explanation: Modal fe'llardan keyin 'to' ishlatilmaydi, shuning uchun bu variant xato.

question_text: Complete the sentence: 'They are very good swimmers, so they __________ swim across the river.'
explanation: Qobiliyat (imkoniyat) ifodalanayotgani uchun 'can' ishlatiladi.

question_text: The flowers ____ (water) tomorrow.
explanation: Kelasi zamonda majhul nisbat yasash uchun 'will be' va fe'lning 3-shakli (V3) ishlatiladi.

question_text: The project ____ (finish) next week.
explanation: Ish-harakat kelajakda bajarilishi uchun 'will be' va fe'lning 3-shakli (V3) kerak bo'ladi.

question_text: This task ____ (must / do) by the student.
explanation: Modal fe'llar bilan majhul nisbat yasalganda 'must'dan keyin 'be' va fe'lning 3-shakli (V3) qo'yiladi.

question_text: The car ____ (should / repair) soon.
explanation: Modal fe'llar (should) bilan majhul nisbatda 'be' va fe'lning 3-shakli (V3) ishlatiladi.

question_text: The gate ____ (can / open) by a key.
explanation: Majhul nisbatda 'can' modal fe'lidan keyin 'be' va fe'lning 3-shakli (V3) ishlatilishi qoidasi qo'llandi.

question_text: The medicine ____ (must / take) after dinner.
explanation: Dori o'zini o'zi ichmaydi, u ichiladi. Shuning uchun 'must be' va fe'lning 3-shakli (V3) ishlatiladi.

question_text: The new house ____ (will / build) next year.
explanation: Kelasi zamon uchun 'will be' birikmasi va fe'lning 3-shakli (V3) talab qilinadi.

question_text: The rules ____ (must / follow) by everyone.
explanation: Qoidalarga rioya qilinishi kerakligini aytish uchun modal fe'l qoidasiga ko'ra 'must be' va V3 ishlatildi.

question_text: The song ____ (can / hear) from the distance.
explanation: Qo'shiq o'zini o'zi eshitmaydi, u eshitiladi. Modal fe'l qoidasiga binoan 'can be' va fe'lning 3-shakli (V3) to'g'ri keladi.

question_text: The documents ____ (will / sign) tomorrow morning.
explanation: Kelajakda bajariladigan ish majhul nisbatda bo'lgani uchun 'will be' va fe'lning 3-shakli (V3) to'g'ri variantdir.

question_text: My flight __________ at 6:00 AM tomorrow, so I need to be at the airport early.
explanation: Samolyot qatnovi jadval asosida bo'lgani uchun 'Present Simple' (leaves) ishlatiladi.

question_text: The cinema _____ at 7:00 PM tonight.
explanation: Bu ish-harakat tashqi jadval asosida sodir bo'lgani uchun 'Present Simple' (opens) ishlatiladi.

question_text: I __________ my dentist at 3:00 PM today. I have already made the appointment.
explanation: Bu shaxsiy reja va kelishuv bo'lgani uchun 'Present Continuous' (am meeting) to'g'ri keladi.

question_text: I _____ my friend for lunch tomorrow at 1:00 PM.
explanation: Bu insonning shaxsiy va oldindan kelishilgan rejasi bo'lgani uchun 'Present Continuous' (am meeting) to'g'ri keladi.

question_text: The football match __________ at 8:00 PM tonight according to the official schedule.
explanation: Rasmiy jadval asosidagi voqealar uchun 'Present Simple' (starts) ishlatiladi.

question_text: The final exam _____ on Friday at 9:00 AM.
explanation: Imtihon jadval asosida belgilangan qat'iy vaqtda bo'lgani uchun 'Present Simple' (starts) ishlatiladi.

question_text: We __________ to London tomorrow morning. We have already bought the tickets.
explanation: Chiptalar olingan va reja aniq bo'lgani uchun 'Present Continuous' (are flying) ishlatiladi.

question_text: We _____ to Paris tomorrow morning. We have already bought the tickets.
explanation: Bu insonning shaxsiy rejasi va kelishilgan harakat bo'lgani uchun 'Present Continuous' (are flying) qo'llaniladi.

question_text: Look at the time! The bus __________ in five minutes, we must hurry.
explanation: Avtobus qatnovi jadval asosida bo'lgani uchun 'Present Simple' (arrives) tanlanadi.

question_text: The bus _____ from the station every day at 8:00 AM.
explanation: Poyezd yoki avtobus qatnovi jadval asosida bo'lgani uchun 'Present Simple' (departs) ishlatiladi.

question_text: I __________ dinner with my business partner tonight. Everything is confirmed.
explanation: Shaxsiy kelishuv va reja bo'lgani uchun 'Present Continuous' (am having) to'g'ri javob.

question_text: I _____ my dentist tomorrow afternoon at 4:00 PM.
explanation: Shifokor qabuli insonning shaxsiy rejasi bo'lgani uchun 'Present Continuous' (am seeing) ishlatiladi.

question_text: What time __________ the movie start? I want to make sure we are not late.
explanation: Kino seanslari jadval asosida bo'lgani uchun 'Present Simple' savol shakli (does) ishlatiladi.

question_text: The concert _____ at 8:00 PM according to the schedule.
explanation: Konsert jadval asosida belgilangani uchun 'Present Simple' (begins) ishlatiladi.

question_text: My sister __________ to Paris next week. She has her visa and flight ready.
explanation: Barcha tayyorgarlik ko'rilgan va aniq rejalashtirilgan ish uchun 'Present Continuous' (is going) ishlatiladi.

question_text: Look at my calendar: I _____ a business meeting tomorrow at 10 AM.
explanation: Kalendarga yozib qo'yilgan rejalashtirilgan ish bo'lgani uchun 'Present Continuous' (am having) to'g'ri.

question_text: The flight to New York _____ at 11:30 PM tonight.
explanation: Parvozlar jadval asosida amalga oshiriladi, shuning uchun 'Present Simple' (leaves) ishlatiladi.

question_text: The semester __________ on Monday. You can check the university website for details.
explanation: Darslar jadvali rasmiy hisoblanadi, shuning uchun 'Present Simple' (begins) ishlatiladi.

question_text: I can't go out tonight because I __________ my grandmother at the station.
explanation: Bu shaxsiy reja va oldindan kelishilgan ish-harakat bo'lgani uchun 'Present Continuous' (am meeting) to'g'ri.

question_text: My sister _____ her graduation ceremony tomorrow evening.
explanation: Bu insonning kelajakdagi aniq rejalashtirilgan harakati bo'lgani uchun 'Present Continuous' (is attending) ishlatiladi.

question_text: Complete the sentence: At 9 PM tonight, I ___________ a book.
explanation: Future Continuous formula ega + will be + fe'l(-ing) tarzida yasaladi, shuning uchun 'will be reading' to'g'ri variantdir.

question_text: Choose the correct structure for the Future Continuous tense.
explanation: According to Card 2, the Future Continuous tense is formed by using 'will be' and adding the '-ing' suffix to the main verb.

question_text: Choose the correct form: They ___________ football at this time tomorrow.
explanation: Kelasi davomli zamon yasash uchun 'will be' va fe'lga '-ing' qo'shimchasi qo'shilishi kerak.

question_text: At 7 AM tomorrow, I ________ breakfast with my family.
explanation: Based on Card 2, the structure is 'will be' + verb with '-ing'. Therefore, 'will be having' is the correct form.

question_text: Which sentence correctly shows the negative form of Future Continuous?
explanation: Inkor gapda 'not' so'zi 'will' va 'be' fe'llari orasiga joylashtiriladi.

question_text: Which of the following is the correct negative form of Future Continuous?
explanation: Card 3 states that in negative sentences, 'not' is placed between 'will' and 'be' (won't be).

question_text: Choose the correct question form: ___________ you be working tomorrow?
explanation: So'roq gaplarda 'will' yordamchi fe'li egadan oldinga o'tishi kerak.

question_text: Complete the sentence: 'This time next week, we ________ to London.'
explanation: Future Continuous uses 'will be' + '-ing' to describe a process at a specific time in the future, as mentioned in Card 4.

question_text: My sister ___________ for her exams all evening tomorrow.
explanation: Kelajakdagi aniq bir vaqtda (all evening) davom etayotgan harakat uchun 'will be studying' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Which question form is correct for the Future Continuous tense?
explanation: Card 3 explains that in questions, 'will' moves to the front of the sentence before the subject.

question_text: Convert this sentence to the negative form: 'He will be running.'
explanation: 'won't be' shakli 'will not be' ning qisqartmasi bo'lib, inkor gaplarda qo'llaniladi.

question_text: Choose the correct sentence describing a planned action at a specific time.
options: She will be sleep at 9 PM.
She will be sleeping at 9 PM.
correct_answer: She will be sleeping at 9 PM.
explanation: As per Cards 2 and 4, we use 'will be' + '-ing' to show what will be happening at a precise future time.

question_text: At this time next week, we ___________ to Paris.
explanation: Kelajakdagi aniq vaqtni ifodalovchi 'at this time' birikmasi Future Continuous zamonini talab qiladi.

question_text: Convert this sentence to the negative: 'They will be playing football.'
options: They will be not playing football.
They not will be playing football.
explanation: Card 3 specifies that the negative form is 'will not be' (or 'won't be'), placed before the '-ing' verb.

question_text: Choose the correct question: ___________ they be waiting for us?
explanation: Future Continuous so'roq shaklida 'will' egadan oldin turishi qoida qilib belgilangan.

question_text: Identify the usage of Future Continuous in: 'At 10 PM tonight, I will be reading a book.'
options: To describe a continuous action at a specific future time.
correct_answer: To describe a continuous action at a specific future time.
explanation: Card 1 and 4 explain that this tense describes actions happening at a specific, stated moment in the future.

question_text: Identify the correct sentence:
options: She will be eat at 7 PM.
She will be eating at 7 PM.
correct_answer: She will be eating at 7 PM.
explanation: Formula 'will + be + fe'l(-ing)' bo'lgani uchun 'will be eating' yagona to'g'ri variantdir.

question_text: Complete the dialogue: 'Will you be waiting for me?' 'No, I ________.'
explanation: Card 3 explains the negative form: 'will not' or 'won't' followed by 'be' and the '-ing' form of the verb.

question_text: Which of these is the correct negative form of 'They will be watching TV'?
options: They will be not watching TV.
explanation: Inkor gapda 'will' va 'be' orasiga 'not' qo'yiladi, 'will not' esa 'won't' shaklida qisqartirilishi mumkin.

question_text: Which of these sentences correctly uses the Future Continuous structure?
options: At 5 PM, she will be working.
At 5 PM, she will be work.
correct_answer: At 5 PM, she will be working.
explanation: This follows the rule in Card 2 and 4: specific time + 'will be' + verb with '-ing' suffix.

question_text: By 10 PM tonight, I ________ my presentation.
explanation: Ishning 10 PM ga kelib tugallanishi nazarda tutilgani uchun 'will have + V3' (Future Perfect) ishlatiladi.

question_text: By 6 o'clock tomorrow, I _____ (finish) my report.
explanation: Gapda ish-harakat kelajakda aniq bir vaqtga kelib tugashi nazarda tutilgan. Bu natijani bildirgani uchun Future Perfect (will have + V3) ishlatiladi.
